US: US1: As a coach I should be able to see the "Saved Responses" button in Inbox if the workspace subscription is a Paid plan (from Pro) or Trial Plan
AC: AC1: Workspace is in Trial or Paid plans
Step:
1. Set workspace to Trial plan
2. Login as Coach (any role)
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
Title: Trial plan - Saved Responses access for all coach roles
Expectation: - SHOULD allow Coach (all roles) to use "Saved Responses" feature
Priority: High

Title:
1. Set workspace to Pro plan
2. Login as Coach (any role)
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
Expectation: Pro plan - Saved Responses access for all coach roles
Priority: - SHOULD allow Coach (all roles) to use "Saved Responses" feature

Title:
1. Set workspace to Studio plan
2. Login as Coach (any role)
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
Expectation: Studio plan - Saved Responses access for all coach roles
Priority: - SHOULD allow Coach (all roles) to use "Saved Responses" feature

Title:
1. Set workspace to Bundle plan
2. Login as Coach (any role)
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
Expectation: Bundle plan - Saved Responses access for all coach roles
Priority: - SHOULD allow Coach (all roles) to use "Saved Responses" feature

Title:
1. Set workspace to Trial/Pro/Studio/Bundle plan
2. Login as Coach
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Observe Saved Responses button
Expectation: Paid plan - button enabled state
Priority: - SHOULD display button as enabled in the inbox chat

Title:
1. Set workspace to Trial/Pro/Studio/Bundle plan
2. Login as Coach
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Click Saved Responses button
5. Save a message template
Expectation: Paid plan - save message functionality
Priority: - SHOULD allow user to save message as current behavior

Title:
1. Set workspace to Trial/Pro/Studio/Bundle plan
2. Login as Coach
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Click Saved Responses button
5. Use a saved message template
Expectation: Paid plan - use saved message functionality
Priority: - SHOULD allow user to use saved message as current behavior

AC: AC2: Workspace is in Free Plan
Step:
1. Set workspace to Free Plan
2. Login as Coach
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Observe Saved Responses button
Title: Free plan - button disabled state
Expectation: - SHOULD disable the Saved Responses button with icon for upgrade
Priority: High

Title:
1. Set workspace to Free Plan
2. Login as Coach
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Hover on the Saved Responses icon
Expectation: Free plan - hover tooltip display
Priority:
- SHOULD change button state as in the design
- SHOULD display tooltip "Upgrade to use Save Response feature"

Title:
1. Set workspace to Free Plan
2. Login as Owner
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Click the Saved Responses button
Expectation: Free plan - Owner clicks button navigation
Priority: - SHOULD navigate to billing page which focuses on "Pro" plan

Title:
1. Set workspace to Free Plan
2. Login as Admin
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Click the Saved Responses button
Expectation: Free plan - Admin clicks button navigation
Priority: - SHOULD navigate to billing page which focuses on "Pro" plan

Title:
1. Set workspace to Free Plan
2. Login as Trainer
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Click the Saved Responses button
Expectation: Free plan - Trainer clicks button pop-up display
Priority: - SHOULD show pop-up informing trainer to reach out to workspace owner for upgrade

Title:
1. Set workspace to Free Plan
2. Login as Trainer
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Click the Saved Responses button
5. Observe pop-up content
Expectation: Free plan - Trainer pop-up content
Priority: - SHOULD show owner's name in the pop-up (same pop-up for broadcast feature)

Title:
1. Set workspace to Free Plan
2. Login as Trainer
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Click the Saved Responses button
5. Click 'x' button on pop-up
Expectation: Free plan - Trainer pop-up close action
Priority: - SHOULD close pop-up

AC: AC3: Update Billing Page with "Saved Responses" option
Title: Billing page - Saved Responses option in Pro plan
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Saved Responses" option in Pro plan in "Compare" section
Priority: High

Title: Billing page - Saved Responses option in Studio plan
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Saved Responses" option in Studio plan in "Compare" section
Priority: High

Title: Billing page - Saved Responses highlighted in Pro plan
Expectation: - SHOULD highlight "Saved Responses" in "Pro" plan
Priority: High

Title: Billing page - Saved Responses not highlighted in Studio plan
Expectation: - SHOULD NOT highlight "Saved Responses" in "Studio" plan
Priority: High

Title: Billing page - Saved Responses title
Expectation: - SHOULD display title "Saved Responses"
Priority: High

Step:
1. Navigate to billing page
2. Hover on the Saved Responses option
Title: Billing page - Saved Responses tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Save and reuse message templates to respond to client inquiries instantly from your Inbox."
Priority: Medium

Step: 1. Navigate to billing modal for bundle
Title: Billing page - Bundle plan exclusion
Expectation: - SHOULD NOT add Saved Responses option in the billing modal
Priority: Medium

Step:
1. Set workspace to Pro plan
2. Login as Trainer
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Open Saved Responses function
5. Admin/Owner downgrades to Free plan
Title: Downgrade from Pro - function blocked
Expectation: - SHOULD block the Saved Responses function
Priority: Critical

Title:
1. Set workspace to Studio plan
2. Login as Trainer
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Open Saved Responses function
5. Admin/Owner downgrades to Free plan
Expectation: Downgrade from Studio - function blocked
Priority: - SHOULD block the Saved Responses function

Title:
1. Set workspace to Pro plan
2. Login as Trainer
3. Navigate to Inbox tab
4. Use Saved Responses function
5. Admin/Owner downgrades to Free plan
Expectation: Downgrade - logout pop-up display
Priority: - SHOULD show pop-up requesting trainer to log out (same UC when downgrade to Free plan for broadcast function)
